name: Harbour
notes: Mechanically a Farm equivalent (Food output), gated behind the same water-adjacency requirement as Port — not a separate production chain (see game-design/02-bases-and-buildings.md). Deliberately steep growth curve vs. Farm's mild one: lower level-1 output but +60%/level compounding, so a maxed-out Harbour eventually out-produces a maxed-out Farm despite the weaker starting point. "Fishing boats" are purely visual (boat count scales with level) — no separate boat unit/entity. Requires Wood to build/upgrade, unlike Farm. Ticks automatically every 5s resource tick, no player input (Resource category). HP regen follows the global rule (5% of current max HP per 5s tick), not a per-building field.
